request: Shape 'saved searches' from a raw idea into a proof-first plan.

inputs.note: users re-run the same filters weekly

evidence.statement: Cited 3 support tickets and 1 sales-call quote, observed this session.
All four sources describe re-running identical filters; none ask for alerts.
No usage data yet on how many users re-filter; frequency is assumed.

decisionsNeeded: Is alerting in scope for v1, or just saved views?

pathToShip.item: Write the one-page spec: saved views only, no alerts in v1
Confirm alerting is out of v1 scope

verdict.reason: Direction is evidence-backed, but the alerting boundary is an open decision.
verdict.nextAction: Confirm scope, then the spec is ready to write.
